## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on Smith.ai's goals, target audience, and content strategy for GrowthX engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Smith.ai offers two main products: Virtual Receptionists (VR, human-led) and Voice Assistants (VA, AI-led) with some overlap in features](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Primary focus is on acquiring high-quality traffic for AI answering service while maintaining VR positioning](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Target audience: Small/medium service-based businesses with high client value (e.g. lawyers, roofers) and their marketing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Key pain point: Busy business owners know they need better systems but struggle to prioritize implementation](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2563.0)

## Topics

### Product Overview: VR vs VA

  - [VR: Human-led, higher cost, handles complex interactions](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [VA: AI-led, lower cost, handles simpler tasks](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Overlap in basic functions like message taking, intake](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing SEO/content strategy for both products as they evolve](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)

### Target Audience & Pain Points

  - [Small/medium service businesses (lawyers, roofers, etc.) with high client value](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [2+ phone calls per day minimum](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Pain points: Too busy, lack business skills, know they need better systems](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2593.0)
  - [Trigger for change often involves losing a big client or staff quitting](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)

### Content Strategy & SEO Focus

  - [Prioritize acquiring high-quality traffic for "AI answering service"](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2757.0)
  - [Maintain positioning for established "virtual receptionist" keywords](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2757.0)
  - [Improve landing pages and homepage for better conversion](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Consider interactive elements like calculators to boost engagement](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

### Integration & Technical Considerations

  - [Integrations are a key value prop (e.g. CRMs, practice management software)](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [In-house web dev team uses Webflow for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)

### Current Performance & Goals

  - [15-20% of new monthly clients come from organic search](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Aim to improve landing page conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2997.0)
  - [Balance content strategy between VA and VR products](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to review shared documents (sales deck, Siege work, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Smith.ai to provide VA vs VR comparison document](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Smith.ai to review and provide feedback on Company Brief document](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct initial research and prepare Content OS in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for Wednesday at 11am PT/2pm ET (1 hour)](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=3141.0)
  - [GrowthX to send recap with action items for Smith.ai before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/5sP3GQ4HoDGsaHSUgAJ2DvVXC8DtVqkx?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
